summary.zh-CN: 匿名视图不再把平台内曲师回退显示为用户 ID，匿名编号也已轮换为新版规则。
summary.en: Anonymous views no longer fall back to platform composer user IDs, and anonymous labels now use the refreshed ID rule.

title.zh-CN: 隐藏缺少姓名的曲师 ID

description.zh-CN: 当前端只拿到平台内曲师的用户 ID、没有拿到可展示姓名时，曲目详情不再显示平台内曲师行，避免暴露真实账号线索。
description.en: When the frontend only receives platform composer user IDs without displayable names, track details no longer render the platform composer row.

description.zh-CN: 同行评审等匿名场景使用新版前端匿名编号，同一用户仍保持全站一致，但旧编号会被替换。
description.en: Anonymous peer-review labels now use the refreshed frontend hash. The same user remains consistent across the app, while old labels are replaced.
